_comment: FLOW-SYNC/1 AES-256-GCM seal/open golden vector with a FIXED nonce (reproducibility only; production uses a random nonce per frame). AAD = ver(0x01) ∥ session_id(16) ∥ frame_type(1) ∥ seq(8 BE). wire = nonce(12) ∥ ciphertext ∥ tag(16). key_hex is the host->client directional key from hkdf.json.
